name: Sweet 'n' Sour Sauced Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 small green bell pepper, seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables: Cut the carrot thinly using a diagonal cut and seed the green bell pepper before cutting into strips.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add pork and cook until browned on all sides.
3. Remove the pork from the pan and set aside. In the same pan, add sesame oil and sauté sliced onions until fragrant.
4. Stir in brown sugar, cornstarch, water, red wine vinegar, soy sauce, and ground ginger. Mix well to combine.
5. Return the pork to the pan and simmer for 2-3 minutes to allow the sauce to thicken.
6. Add sliced carrots, green bell pepper strips, and cooked rice to the pan. Cook until heated through.
7. Stir in pineapple chunks and taste the dish. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
8. Turn off the heat and serve hot with cooked rice on the side.
